calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2018 Off Calendar

Request To Set Case For Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Jun-21-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant David Romero Gonzalez.
Dept. 514. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Roger E. Jackson, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Preserver Insurance Company, a corporation.
Thomas Egan, Sr., Senior Claims Adjuster for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Rajendra Sunar, plaintiff's insured driver, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defaulted defendant David Romero Gonzalez, an individual.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on March 22, 2016 and served via publication on August 22, 2017.
Default was entered against defendant on October 2, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed on February 26, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Preserver Insurance Company, a corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant David Romero Gonzalez, an individual, as follows:

Damages - $30,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,630.41.
Costs - $375.00.

Total - $34,005.41.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
